headline.title: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8：官方称“适度但切实的改进”
headline.summary: Anthropic 今日推出 Claude Opus 4.8。官方声明称其相对上一代有“适度但切实的改进”，并强调正在研发低成本版本。该模型在多项基准测试中表现提升，但并非重大突破。
headline.title_en: Claude Opus 4.8: "a modest but tangible improvement"
headline.summary_en: Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.8 today. The release notes call it a 'modest but tangible improvement' over its predecessor, with ongoing work on lower-cost models. The model shows incremental gains across benchmarks, but is not a breakthrough.
headline.reason: 作为AI前沿模型的最新迭代，体现了行业以渐进式优化和成本控制为主导的发展趋势，且评分在所有候选新闻中最高。
headline.reason_en: As the latest iteration of a frontier AI model, it highlights the industry's focus on incremental improvement and cost optimization, and it has the highest score among all candidate items.
